source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body text, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Dense 8px product grids, canopy-layer separators, misted monitoring panels, compact environmental charts, and tropical-forest hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent rainforest motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a rainforest canopy cluster, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A dense tropical rainforest canopy cluster with layered deep emerald leaves, mist green highlights, fern light tips, bark brown branch structure, moss shadow depth, and accurate humid forest foliage.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the outer leaves, branch edges, or canopy silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves leaf layering, wet surface detail, canopy density, and natural tropical color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no full jungle scene, no sky background, no animals, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rainforest" derived from the visible transparent rainforest canopy cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the deep emerald leaves, mist green highlights, fern light tips, bark brown branches, moss shadow depth, wet leaf texture, and dense canopy layering in the visible cutout. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainforest, Rainforest, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, mist-green surfaces, canopy-layer dividers, wet leaf texture samples, dense monitoring-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: mist green, deep emerald, leaf green, fern light, canopy lime, pale mist, moss shadow, bark brown, canopy ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rainforest".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Rainforest design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent rainforest canopy cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Rainforest board as references. Preserve the deep emerald, mist green, bark brown, and fern palette roles, dense component language, canopy-layer dividers, monitoring spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainforest, Rainforest, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from canopy ink and bark brown, light text from mist green, primary accents from deep emerald, secondary accents from leaf green, fern light and canopy lime chart details, restrained contrast, subtle wet-leaf and canopy overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rainforest".
